title: Add mock theory generator (Golden Test 15)
problem: ticket-016 produces cluster reports with balanced evidence packets, but candidate theories are not yet generated. Golden Test 15 requires theory proposals with caveats, not facts.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 15: theory generator creates candidate theories, not facts.
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic candidate theory generation from golden cluster evidence without Ollama.
Theory JSON includes supporting claims, contradicting/qualifying claims, boundary conditions, weakening evidence, and next questions.
Theories stored as candidates, never as accepted facts.
non_goals: Do not implement LangGraph or live web discovery.
Do not add public write routes.
